tasks.prompt:
OAuth health check (read-only). The host process owns token refresh every 30 minutes — do not edit files under /workspace/extra/credentials/.

1. Run `ncl oauth-health` and review all tokens.
2. Post to #sysops (slack:C07F195GB96) only when scriptOutput shows expired/errors, any token has status expired or error, or `ncl oauth-refresh-now` returns failed for any token. Do not alert for status expiring or expiresInMin alone — Xero tokens are short-lived and the host refreshes them proactively.
3. If you post, run `ncl oauth-refresh-now` first and include results. If refresh still fails, name the token id and token_file for manual re-auth.
4. If all tokens are ok or only expiring, exit silently.

Run im-sync. The pre-task script attached results in scriptOutput. Post a concise summary to #sysops (slack:C07F195GB96). Deliver a brief status to Cian's DM if scriptOutput indicates actionable items.
Run im-digest. The pre-task script attached digest data in scriptOutput. Deliver the digest to Cian's Slack DM (U07F1909LCQ) in a warm, scannable format.
Run weekly im-audit. The pre-task script attached audit results in scriptOutput. Post summary to #sysops (slack:C07F195GB96).
Run ganttsy-resume daily pipeline. The pre-task script attached results in scriptOutput. Post summary to #sysops (slack:C07F195GB96).

Deliver Christina's daily cycle briefing to Christina. The pre-task script attached today's briefing in scriptOutput. Send it in Christina's DM — keep the structure and tone warm and supportive. Do not re-run cycle_briefing.mjs unless scriptOutput is missing.

pendingCleo.note: Cleo slack_scheduled tasks (im-sync, im-digest, im-audit, ganttsy-resume-daily, oauth-health-check) need v2 agent group + messaging wiring before seeding. RETIRED — do not re-seed: transcript-sync, transcript-unmatched-reminder, pending-actions-reminder, catch-up-auditor (transcript replay). Meeting lookup: transcript-search + Mac shadow-sync.
